title: Proclamation No. 287, s. 1967
text:
MALACAÑANG RESIDENCE OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 287

AMENDING PROCLAMATION NO. 705, DATED SEPTEMBER 28, 1960, WHICH RESERVED FOR SPECIFIC PUBLIC PURPOSES CERTAIN PARCELS OF LAND OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN MENTIONED THEREIN SITUATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF POLOMOLOK, PROVINCE OF COTABATO, ISLAND OF MINDANAO, BY CHANGING THE PARCELS RESERVED FOR PARKS AND MARKET SITES PURPOSES.

Upon recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Natural Resources and pursuant to the authority vested in me by law, I, FERDINAND E. MARCOS, President of the Philippines, do hereby amend Proclamation No. 705, dated September 28, 1960, which reserved for specific public purposes certain parcels of land of the public domain mentioned therein situated in the Municipality of Polomolok, province of Cotabato, island of Mindanao, by changing the parcels reserved for park and market site purposes so as to correspond to the areas hereunder specified and more particularly described as follows:

(Park Site)

Lot 2880-A, Pls-209-D-19

(Under the administration of the Municipal Government of Polomolok)

A PARCEL OF LAND (Lot 2880-A of Polomolok Pls-209-D-19), situated in the municipality of Polomolok, Province of Cotabato. Bounded on the NW., along line 1-2, by Boulevard; on the NE., along line 2-3, by Road; on the SE., along line 3-4, by Lot 2880-C, Polomolok Pls-209-D19; and on the SW., along line 4-1 by Road. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 56 deg. 13′ W., 11564.71 m. from B.L.L.M. 2, Mp. of Polomolok, Cotabato,

thence N. 45 deg. 24′ E., 150.14 m. to point 2;

thence S. 45 deg. 18′ E., 79.03 m. to point 3;

thence S. 45 deg. 37′ W., 149.94 m. to point 4;

thence N. 45 deg. 27′ W., 78.46 m. to the point of

beginning; containing an area of ELEVEN THOUSAND EIGHT HUNDRED THIRTEEN (11,813) Square Meters.

(Market Site)

Lot 2880-B, Pls-209-D-19

(Under the administration of the Municipal Government of Polomolok)

A PARCEL OF LAND (Lot 2880-B of Polomolok Pls-209-D-19), situated in the Municipality of Polomolok, Province of Cotabato. Bounded on the NE., SE., and SW., along lines 1-2-3-4, by Road; and on the NW., along line 4-1, by Lot 2880-C of Polomolok Pls-209-D-19. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 55 deg. 35′ W., 11440.79 m. from B.L.L.M. 2, Mp of Polomolok, Cotabato,

thence S. 45 deg. 18′ E., 99.77 m. to point 2;

thence S. 45 deg. 20′ W., 149.59 m. to point 3;

thence N. 45 deg. 27′ W., 99.48 m. to point 4;

thence N. 45 deg. 13′ E., 149.84 m. to the point of

beginning; containing an area of FOURTEEN THOUSAND NINE HUNDRED FIFTEEN (14,915) Square Meters.

(Market Site)

Lot 2880-C, Pls-209-D-19

(Under the administration of the Municipal Government of Polomolok)

A PARCEL OF LAND (Lot 2880-C of Polomolok, Pls-209-D-19), situated in the Municipality of Polomolok, Province of Cotabato. Bounded on the SE., along line 1-2, by Lot 2880-B, Polomolok Pls-209-D-19; on the SW., along line 2-3, by Road; on the NW., along line 3-4, by Lot 2880-A, Polomolok Pls-209-D-19; and on the NE., along line 4-1, by Road. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 55 deg. 35′ W., 11440.79 m. from B.L.L.M. 2, Mp. of Polomolok, Cotabato,

thence S. 45 deg. 13′ W., 149.84 m. to point 2;

thence N. 45 deg. 27′ W., 17.19 m. to point 3;

thence N. 45 deg. 37′ E., 149.94 m. to point 4;

thence S. 45 deg. 18′ E., 16.14 m. to the point of

beginning; containing an area of TWO THOUSAND FOUR HUNDRED NINETY NINE (2,499) Square Meters.

(Market Site)

Lot 2882, Pls-209-D-19

(Under the administration of the Municipal Government of Polomolok)

A PARCEL OF LAND (Lot 2882 of Polomolok Pls-209-D-19), situated in the Municipality of Polomolok, Province of Cotabato, Bounded on the NW., NE., SE., and SW., along lines 1-2-3-4-1, by Road. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 55 deg. 30′ W., 11438.93 m. from B.L.L.M. 2, Mp. of Polomolok, Cotabato,

thence N. 45 deg. 24′ E., 150.61 m. to point 2;

thence S. 45 deg. 13′ E., 100.07 m. to point 3;

thence S. 45 deg. 55′ W., 150.05 m. to point 4;

thence N. 45 deg. 33′ W., 98.75 m. to the point of

beginning; containing an area of FOURTEEN THOUSAND NINE HUNDRED FORTY TWO (14,942) Square Meters.

NOTE: ALL DATA are approximate and subject to change based on future surveys.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 11th day of October, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and sixty-seven.

(SGD.) FERDINAND E. MARCOS President of the Philippines

By the President: (SGD.) RAFAEL M. SALAS Executive Secretary

Source : CDAsia
